tests_added.description: Unit tests for packages/opencode must pass
tests_added.code:
# [repo_tests] pass_to_pass
def test_repo_unit_tests():
    """Unit tests for packages/opencode must pass (pass_to_pass)."""
    r = subprocess.run(
        ["bun", "run", "test"],
        cwd=str(PKG_DIR),
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=120,
    )
    assert r.returncode == 0, (
        f"Unit tests failed:\n{r.stdout[-2000:]}\n{r.stderr[-2000:]}"
    )

eval_manifest_additions.description: Unit tests for packages/opencode must pass
